videos.title: Lounge Deep House Vibes | Música de Fundo e Instrumental Definitiva para Dezembro
videos.description: Bem-vindos ao Rhythm Depths! 🛋️ Experimente as melhores Lounge Deep House Vibes – a música de fundo perfeita para dezembro, ideal para relaxar, estudar ou criar um ambiente sofisticado. Mergulhe numa paisagem sonora soulful e relaxante. Transforme o seu espaço num lounge sereno para noites aconchegantes de dezembro com este mix melódico de chill house. Qual é a sua bebida favorita para relaxar? Diga-nos! 👇 Adorou? Dê um like e subscreva para mais música Deep House! 🎧

videos.title: Positive Morning Energy ☀️ | Happy Summer Vibes & Ocean
videos.description:
✨ A premium morning moment woven with the sound of waves and gentle melodies.
This morning lounge mix blends the soothing tones of chillout and ambient music.
Soft sounds will guide you to a calm start of your day.
Take a deep breath, find your balance, and feel the serenity of a seaside morning.

😽Spotify : https://open.spotify.com/intl-ja/albu...
😽Apple Music :   / positive-morning-energy  

Please support us by subscribing and giving a thumbs up.
   / @chillseasidelounge  

🕊 Recommended Scenes
• Morning reading or coffee time
• Work or study sessions when you want to focus quietly
• Chill time or breaks at home
• Yoga, meditation, or mindful morning routines

All music and illustrations on this channel are original and created exclusively.
Unauthorized reproduction, distribution, or use is prohibited.
© 2025 Chill Seaside Lounge. All rights reserved.

#ChilloutMusic #AmbientSounds #OceanMusic #MorningLounge #RelaxingBGM #SlowLifeVibes #HealingMusic #StudyBGM #WorkBGM #MorningMusic

🌺 Best Tropical Deep House Mix 2026 | Chill Vocal Summer Vibes in 4K UHD for TV | XDeep Music

Welcome to XDeep Music - the home of Deep House and Tropical House tunes full of energy and emotion! We bring you high-quality mixes, playlists and background music, perfect for relaxing, working, focusing or simply enjoying great moments. Immerse yourself in the deep music space of Deep House and feel the freshness and optimism of Tropical House. Let's spread positive vibes through music!

Experience the sound of sunshine with Best Tropical Deep House Mix 2026 a smooth collection of chill vocal tracks blended with warm summer rhythms. This mix brings together deep house grooves and light tropical energy to create a relaxing beach-inspired atmosphere.

Perfect for Smart TV playback in 4K UHD, this session is designed for long listening whether you're unwinding at home, working, studying, or setting a calm lounge mood. The seamless transitions keep the vibe steady, peaceful, and uplifting from start to finish.

videos.title: Playlist,,Deep House,Music Played in Louis Vuitton Stores
videos.description:
The Deep House playlist guides you into a world where sophistication and natural sensibility harmoniously intertwine.
Whether in a fashion boutique, designer store, stylish café or hotel, or even at a private fashion show — this music fits seamlessly everywhere.
The smooth, sleek Deep House beats evoke the youthful confidence of Louis Vuitton, creating a modern yet refined atmosphere.
This sound elevates the ambiance of luxury stores and fashion events, subtly reflecting the brand’s personality and elegance.
Experience Louis Vuitton–style lounge music, where urban sophistication meets bold sensibility, leaving a lasting, distinctive impression.
This is an original piece of music I created using AI

videos.title: Feeling Good Mix 2025 | Deep House, Vocal House, Nu Disco, Chillout Mix | Emotional / Intimate Mood
videos.description:
🎵 Welcome to Deep Emotions
🌌 Dive into a world of deep house, chill house, and emotional electronic music. This channel is dedicated to late-night vibes, moody atmospheres, and soul-stirring soundscapes. Whether you're unwinding after a long day or seeking a soundtrack for your introspective moments, Deep Emotions offers carefully curated mixes to match your feelings.
🎵 Deep House • Minimal • Melancholy Grooves
🌌 Black & white aesthetic — pure, raw, and timeless
🕯 Music for moments you can’t put into words
🎬Let the music speak when words fall short.
🔔Subscribe and let the music speak when words fall short.

#DeepHouse #feelingmix #nudisco #chillout #feelingdeep

videos.title: Hugo Boss Música de Loja · Luxury Deep House Playlist Outono 2025
videos.description:
Mergulhe seu espaço de varejo na elegância sofisticada da Hugo Boss. Esta Luxury Deep House playlist entrega Fashion Boutique Beats com estilo refinado, criando a atmosfera perfeita para boutiques, lojas flagship, shoppings, cafés, hotéis e eventos de moda. Um Autumn Vibes Mix cuidadosamente selecionado para experiências premium de compras em 2025.

Música livre de direitos autorais para lojas e eventos de moda, licenciada e segura para uso comercial. Criada por Music for Shops.

🎵 Gêneros nesta playlist:
Deep House
Vocal House
Lounge & Chill House
Minimal Tech House
Nu-Disco

✅ Sim! Toda a música é gerada por IA e autorizada para uso público. Sem problemas de direitos autorais, sem multas — a Music for Shops garante uma atmosfera segura para qualquer espaço comercial ou de varejo.

❓ Preciso pagar ou assinar?
✅ Não. Esta playlist é 100% gratuita e pode ser apreciada a qualquer hora, em qualquer lugar.

❓ A playlist contém letras explícitas?
✅ Não. Todas as faixas são limpas e seguras para qualquer ambiente.

✨ Traga o clima de outono da Gucci para a sua vida — seja fazendo compras, relaxando ou decorando sua boutique.

videos.description:
The Deep House playlist guides you into a world where sophistication and natural sensibility harmoniously intertwine.
Whether in a fashion boutique, designer store, stylish café or hotel, or even at a private fashion show — this music fits seamlessly everywhere.
The smooth, sleek Deep House beats evoke the youthful confidence of Louis Vuitton, creating a modern yet refined atmosphere.
This sound elevates the ambiance of luxury stores and fashion events, subtly reflecting the brand’s personality and elegance.
Experience Louis Vuitton–style lounge music, where urban sophistication meets bold sensibility, leaving a lasting, distinctive impression.
This is an original piece of music I created using AI
